zh.lifeSummary: 當Adeliza de Montfort於1058年出生在奧斯特拉謝時，她的父親Simon de Montfort33歲，母親Agnès d'Évereux13歲。她於1079年與William de Breteuil II結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1128年在法國皮卡迪享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adeliza de Montfort于1058年出生在奧斯特拉謝时，她的父亲Simon de Montfort33岁，母亲Agnès d'Évereux13岁。她于1079年与William de Breteuil II结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1128年在法国皮卡迪享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Adeliza de Montfort was born in 1058, in Austrasia, her father, Simon de Montfort, was 33 and her mother, Agnès d'Évereux, was 13. She married William de Breteuil II in 1079. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1128, in Picardie, France, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adeliza de Montfort est née en 1058, à Austrasie, son père, Simon de Montfort, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agnès d'Évereux, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé William de Breteuil II en 1079. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1128, à Picardie, France, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adeliza de Montfort 1058 in Austrasien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon de Montfort 33 und ihre Mutter Agnès d'Évereux 13. Sie hat 1079 William de Breteuil II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1128 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adeliza de Montfort è nata il nel 1058 nel Austrasien, sua padre, Simon de Montfort, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Agnès d'Évereux, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato William de Breteuil II nel 1079. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1128, nel Picardie, Francia, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.Montfort-L'Amaury, Seine-Et-Oise, Île-De: フランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼモントフォート-ル'アマアウリー

ja.lifeSummary: Adeliza de Montfortが1058年にアウストラシンで生まれた時，父Simon de Montfortは33歳，母Agnès d'Évereuxは13歳であった。1079年にWilliam de Breteuil IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1128年にフランスピカーディで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adeliza de Montfort(이)가 1058년 오스트라시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon de Montfort(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès d'Évereux(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1079년 William de Breteuil II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1128년 프랑스 피카디에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adeliza de Montfort nasceu em 1058, em Austrasien, seu pai, Simon de Montfort, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Agnès d'Évereux, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Breteuil II em 1079. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1128, em Picardie, França, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adeliza de Montfort родилась в 1058 г. в местности аустрасиен, её отцу по имени Simon de Montfort было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agnès d'Évereux, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Breteuil II в 1079 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1128 г. в местности пикарди, Франция в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adeliza de Montfort nació en 1058, en Austrasien, su papá, Simon de Montfort, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Agnès d'Évereux, tenía 13 años. Se casó con William de Breteuil II en 1079. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1128, en Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 70 años.
